channel.title: Mohnish Pabrai — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Mohnish Pabrai: ADDED MU (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) added MU in Q4 2025 · 27.1% of portfolio. More Micron on the memory cycle.

item.title: Mohnish Pabrai: ADDED MU (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) added MU in Q3 2025 · 24.6% of portfolio. Micron cycle bet.

item.title: Mohnish Pabrai: TRIMMED STLA (-25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) trimmed STLA in Q3 2025 · 21.3% of portfolio. Material Stellantis reduction.
